title: State transition path 1 (ALL_TRANSITIONS)
expected_result: Login is denied; user remains in LoggedOut state.

title: EP - Unknown email login denied
precondition: System has no user account with email unknown@example.com
test_steps:
Navigate to login page
Enter email 'unknown@example.com'
Submit login form
expected_result: Login is denied with an error message indicating unknown email.

title: DT - Email unknown condition true -> login denied
precondition: System has no user account with email unknown@example.com
test_steps: Provide email 'unknown@example.com' in login field and submit
